title: INNER JOIN with Subquery produces mal errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table4 (x INTEGER, y TEXT);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, LENGTH(y) AS len FROM table4) AS t1 INNER JOIN table2 AS t2 ON (t1.len = t2.b);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, 3 AS b FROM table4) AS t1 INNER JOIN table2 AS t2 ON (t1.b = t2.b);
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN with subquery on non-matching columns
